expected_behavior: Agent dispatches to the Audit workflow based on the explicit '/nerdbot audit' invocation
Agent loads references/audit-checklist.md before presenting findings or recommendations
Agent runs 'uv run python skills/nerdbot/scripts/kb_inventory.py --root ./knowledge-base' before any recommendation so the audit starts from a read-only inventory
Agent runs 'uv run python skills/nerdbot/scripts/kb_lint.py --root ./knowledge-base' as a read-only verification pass
Agent checks for Obsidian-specific issues such as broken [[wikilinks]], broken embeds, alias collisions, and shared .obsidian drift when the repo is a vault
Agent classifies findings as critical, warning, or suggestion with concrete paths and evidence
Agent recommends the next smallest additive repair batch instead of mutating files during the audit
